Evidence provided in prior audit. This eveidence would be for our former subleased office space. Deactivation from the access control system was managed by our landlord. Meridian requested deactivation on employee departing date, and the landlord security team would deativate and confirm. All access was removed upon the move to our new facility.

Employee access is deacactivated within the WeWork portal on last day of employment. Request has been placed with WeWork to generate a deactivation report. I can share screenshots with proof of deactivation, but the portal does not provide confirmation; simply immediate deactivation of the user account.
Meridian Valencia POC (Mercedes) advises building management to deactivate building access on last day of employement.

The IT team was engaged in resolving the issue, and the restoration process took some time. 
We can provide the relevant IT support ticket as supporting evidence, if required.
